source.name: sotes-mods
source.description: Francesco149's mods for Fortune Summoners: the EN-SE trainer and the Japanese voice patch. This is the default source shipped with the SotES Mod Loader.

_note: The mod-loader-based versions of these mods are being ported (loader phases P6/P7). Until the first release lands, versions[] is empty (nothing installable yet) and the metadata below is the launcher's development target. Schema: sotes-mod-loader/docs/REGISTRY.md.

mods.name: Japanese Voice Patch (EN-SE)
mods.description: Restores the Japanese dialogue voices in the English Special Edition. English text, Japanese spoken lines; the exe is never modified. You supply sotesx_s.dll from your own Japanese copy.

mods.name: EN-SE Trainer
mods.description: Debug/trainer mod: teleport, god mode, map graph, portal warps, dialogue skip, and a Dear ImGui UI. Built for RE and testing.
